rationale: Comprehensive parameter table covers all fields (targetId, targetType, types, tags, includeDeleted, sortBy, isDeleted) with type, required status, and detailed descriptions; return type (LiveCollection) is documented; the includeDeleted nuances (moderator vs user visibility) are explained — missing: maximum values for the types and tags arrays.
suggestions: Add a note on maximum array sizes for types and tags parameters.
Document whether an empty types array behaves the same as omitting the parameter.
